channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Big Tech brushes off DeepSeek threat
item.description: Leaders of major U.S. tech companies at the forefront of artificial intelligence (AI) are brushing off a popular new intelligence model from Chinese startup DeepSeek, despite fears it could upend the industry.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: The oldest evidence for lead pollution comes from ancient Greece
item.description: Researchers have found the oldest known evidence of lead pollution dating to around 5,200 years ago in ancient Greece.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: RX 9070 GPU could theoretically be an RTX 5070 killer, I’m just worried that AMD may not go for Nvidia’s throat with pricing
item.description: AMD’s RX 9070 XT could outgun Nvidia’s RTX 5070 Ti easily, and come within 10% of the RTX 5080 GPU, if fresh rumors prove correct.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI agents are proving remarkably popular - but firms still face a host of challenges
item.description: Most European businesses have or will use AI agents to tackle increasing IT workloads and boost efficiency.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts take their first spacewalk together
item.description: NASA's two stuck astronauts are taking their first spacewalk together, exiting the International Space Station almost eight months after moving in.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mercadona apuesta en firme por la innovación con un Plan de Excelencia Digital
item.description: El gigante español del retail, Mercadona, redobla su apuesta por la innovación y la tecnología con vistas a eficientar la operativa interna y mejorar la experiencia del cliente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: DeepSeek security breach - critical databases exposed, more than one million records reportedly leaked
item.description: A leaky DeepSeek database was discovered by researchers, and could have exposed chat logs, plaintext passwords, API keys, and more.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Trump settles suit with Meta over suspended accounts for $25M
item.description: Meta will pay President Trump $25 million to settle a 2021 lawsuit brought by the president over the social media company’s decision to suspend his accounts in the wake of the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol insurrection. The settlement was filed in federal court in California on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Don’t be so quick to click that Google Calendar invite. It could be a hacker’s trap
item.description: A phishing campaign uses Google Calendar to schedule fake meeting invitations that appear legitimate, redirecting targets to phishing sites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 exceptional text expansion tools for Windows
item.description: Do you find yourself typing the same things over and over? If the answer is yes — and if you type enough text during the workweek, it almost certainly will be — I’d highly recommend you install a text expansion application.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The biggest ideas in software and technology today
item.description: One of the coolest things about being a software developer is that you often know what’s behind the curtain. To some extent, at least.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 breaks the sound barrier—the first private aircraft to do so
item.description: About 35,000 feet (10,670 meters) over the Mojave Desert, northwest of Los Angeles, Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 became the first privately funded airplane to break the sound barrier during a test flight on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Now US government agencies can use OpenAI’s ChatGPT too
item.description: Everyone wants to get their hands on AI tools, and employees in government agencies are no exception. Still, stakes are far higher for governments when it comes to security, privacy, and protecting the public.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump asks Musk to 'go get' NASA astronauts stuck in space
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday that he “asked Elon Musk and @SpaceX to ‘go get’ the 2 brave astronauts who have been virtually abandoned in space.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to share a YouTube video starting at a specific time
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says these steps ensure that your friends and family get to the exact moment you want them to see. Try it out and streamline your sharing experience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world
item.description: "We're focused on geosynchronous Earth orbit, where the most valuable real estate in space," said Bernie Kelm. The post The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network
